description: A server monitoring tool with a Go daemon for collecting system metrics and a React dashboard for visualization

steps: create server-agent/ directory
initialize Go module with go mod init server-agent
install gopsutil/v4 dependency
install go-libsql (Turso) dependency
create directory structure: collector/, storage/, config/
create main.go entry point file
create dashboard/ directory
run npm create vite@latest . -- --template react-ts
install TailwindCSS and configure
install recharts for charting
install @libsql/client for Turso connection
install date-fns for date handling
create directory structure: components/, hooks/, lib/, types/

tasks.description: Set up Turso database and schema
steps: create schema.sql file with all table definitions
create servers table
create cpu_metrics table with indexes
create memory_metrics table with indexes
create swap_metrics table with indexes
create disk_usage_metrics table with indexes
create disk_io_metrics table with indexes
create network_metrics table with indexes
create process_metrics table with indexes
create config/config.go
implement Config struct with Turso URL, auth token, interval, hostname
implement LoadConfig() function to read from environment variables
add validation for required environment variables
add sensible defaults for optional values
create storage/turso.go
implement TursoClient struct
implement NewTursoClient() constructor with connection
implement RegisterServer() to upsert server entry
implement InsertCPUMetrics() method
implement InsertMemoryMetrics() method
implement InsertSwapMetrics() method
implement InsertDiskUsageMetrics() method
implement InsertDiskIOMetrics() method
implement InsertNetworkMetrics() method
implement InsertProcessMetrics() method
implement Close() method for cleanup
create collector/types.go with metric structs
create collector/cpu.go - CollectCPU() function
create collector/memory.go - CollectMemory() and CollectSwap() functions
create collector/disk.go - CollectDiskUsage() and CollectDiskIO() functions
create collector/network.go - CollectNetwork() function
create collector/process.go - CollectTopProcesses() function (top 10 by CPU/memory)

tasks.description: Implement main daemon loop and orchestration
steps: implement main() entry point
load configuration from environment
initialize Turso client connection
register server in database
create ticker for 5-second interval
implement collection loop calling all collectors
push all metrics to Turso in each iteration
implement graceful shutdown with signal handling (SIGINT, SIGTERM)
add logging for collection cycles and errors

tasks.description: Implement Turso client for React dashboard
steps: create src/lib/turso.ts
implement createTursoClient() with browser-compatible libSQL
implement fetchCPUMetrics(serverId, startTime, endTime) query
implement fetchMemoryMetrics(serverId, startTime, endTime) query
implement fetchSwapMetrics(serverId, startTime, endTime) query
implement fetchDiskUsageMetrics(serverId, startTime, endTime) query
implement fetchDiskIOMetrics(serverId, startTime, endTime) query
implement fetchNetworkMetrics(serverId, startTime, endTime) query
implement fetchProcessMetrics(serverId, startTime, endTime) query
implement fetchServers() to list available servers
create src/lib/auth.ts
implement login(username, password) function
implement logout() function
implement isAuthenticated() check
store auth token in localStorage
create src/components/LoginForm.tsx
create src/components/ProtectedRoute.tsx wrapper
create src/types/metrics.ts
define Server interface
define CPUMetric interface
define MemoryMetric interface
define SwapMetric interface
define DiskUsageMetric interface
define DiskIOMetric interface
define NetworkMetric interface
define ProcessMetric interface
define TimeRange type for filtering

tasks.description: Implement custom hooks for data fetching
steps: create src/hooks/useMetrics.ts
implement useServers() hook
implement useCPUMetrics(serverId, timeRange) hook
implement useMemoryMetrics(serverId, timeRange) hook
implement useSwapMetrics(serverId, timeRange) hook
implement useDiskMetrics(serverId, timeRange) hook
implement useNetworkMetrics(serverId, timeRange) hook
implement useProcessMetrics(serverId, timeRange) hook
implement auto-refresh with configurable interval
create src/components/charts/CPUChart.tsx - line chart for CPU usage over time
create src/components/charts/MemoryChart.tsx - area chart for memory usage
create src/components/charts/SwapChart.tsx - area chart for swap usage
create src/components/charts/DiskUsageChart.tsx - bar chart for disk partitions
create src/components/charts/DiskIOChart.tsx - line chart for read/write bytes
create src/components/charts/NetworkChart.tsx - line chart for bytes sent/received
create src/components/charts/ProcessList.tsx - table for top processes
create src/components/TimeRangeSelector.tsx - dropdown/buttons for time range
create src/components/ServerSelector.tsx - dropdown to switch servers
create src/components/DashboardHeader.tsx - header with selectors and logout
create src/components/MetricCard.tsx - wrapper card for each metric section
create src/components/LoadingSpinner.tsx - loading state indicator
create src/pages/Dashboard.tsx - main dashboard with all charts
create src/pages/Login.tsx - login page
update src/App.tsx with routing and protected routes
implement responsive grid layout for charts
add error boundary for chart failures
create collector/cpu_test.go - test CPU collection
create collector/memory_test.go - test memory and swap collection
create collector/disk_test.go - test disk usage and I/O collection
create collector/network_test.go - test network collection
create collector/process_test.go - test process collection
create config/config_test.go - test config loading
create storage/turso_test.go - test Turso client (mock or integration)

tasks.description: Set up linting and static analysis for Go
steps: install golangci-lint
create .golangci.yml configuration
run golangci-lint run to check for issues
run go vet ./... for static analysis
run go build ./... to verify compilation
fix any linting or type errors
install vitest and @testing-library/react
configure vitest in vite.config.ts
create src/components/charts/__tests__/CPUChart.test.tsx
create src/components/charts/__tests__/MemoryChart.test.tsx
create src/hooks/__tests__/useMetrics.test.ts
create src/lib/__tests__/auth.test.ts
run pnpm test:run to verify all tests pass

tasks.description: Set up linting and type checking for React
steps: install oxlint for linting
configure pnpm lint script
run pnpm lint to check for issues
run tsc --noEmit to verify TypeScript types
fix any linting or type errors

tasks.description: Integrate TanStack Router for type-safe routing
steps: install @tanstack/react-router and @tanstack/router-devtools dependencies
create src/routes/__root.tsx - root layout with ErrorBoundary
create src/routes/_authenticated.tsx - protected layout with auth guard using beforeLoad
create src/routes/_authenticated/index.tsx - dashboard route
create src/routes/login.tsx - public login route
create src/lib/router.ts - router configuration and route tree
update src/main.tsx to use RouterProvider
update src/App.tsx to render router outlet
update src/lib/auth.ts to use router.navigate() for redirects
remove conditional rendering logic and migrate pages to routes

tasks.description: Integrate TanStack Query for data fetching and caching
steps: install @tanstack/react-query and @tanstack/react-query-devtools dependencies
create src/lib/queryClient.ts with QueryClient configuration
create src/lib/queryKeys.ts with query key factory for all metric types
update src/main.tsx to wrap app with QueryClientProvider
refactor useServers() hook to use useQuery
refactor useCPUMetrics() hook to use useQuery with refetchInterval
refactor useMemoryMetrics() hook to use useQuery with refetchInterval
refactor useSwapMetrics() hook to use useQuery with refetchInterval
refactor useDiskMetrics() hook to use useQuery with refetchInterval
refactor useNetworkMetrics() hook to use useQuery with refetchInterval
refactor useProcessMetrics() hook to use useQuery with refetchInterval
update hook tests to work with TanStack Query
create server-agent.service systemd service file
add ExecStart pointing to binary
add EnvironmentFile for secrets
add Restart=always for resilience
document installation steps in README
build binary with GOOS=linux GOARCH=amd64 go build
configure environment variables for production Turso URL
run npm run build to create production build
verify dist/ output is correct
document deployment to Vercel/Netlify/self-hosted
start Go daemon locally with test Turso database
verify metrics are being inserted into Turso
start React dashboard in development mode
verify charts display real data
test time range filtering queries
test basic auth login/logout flow
test auto-refresh functionality

tasks.description: Create Dockerfile for Go daemon testing
steps: create server-agent/Dockerfile using Ubuntu base image
copy pre-built Linux binary into container
set up environment variables for Turso connection
configure entrypoint to run server-agent binary
add .dockerignore to exclude unnecessary files

tasks.description: Create Dockerfile for React dashboard with nginx
steps: create dashboard/Dockerfile using nginx:alpine base
copy built dist/ files into nginx html directory
create nginx.conf for SPA routing (fallback to index.html)
configure environment variable injection at runtime
add .dockerignore to exclude node_modules and source

tasks.description: Create Docker Compose for full-stack testing
steps: create docker-compose.yml in project root
add sqld service using libsql/sqld image for local database
add server-agent service with depends_on sqld
add dashboard service using nginx container
configure shared network for inter-container communication
add volume mounts for database persistence
create .env.docker template with all required variables
document usage in README (docker compose up)

tasks.description: Add backend API layer to secure database credentials
steps: create api-server/ directory with Go HTTP server
implement /api/servers endpoint proxying Turso queries
implement /api/metrics/:type endpoint with server_id and time range params
move Turso credentials from frontend to backend environment
update dashboard to fetch from API instead of direct Turso connection
remove VITE_TURSO_* environment variables from frontend
add CORS configuration for dashboard origin
replace SHA-256 with bcrypt for password hashing
implement JWT tokens with expiration (e.g., 24h)
add refresh token rotation mechanism
move auth validation to backend API
add rate limiting on login endpoint (max 5 attempts per minute)
implement audit logging for auth attempts
remove default password hash from docker-compose.yml

tasks.description: Add security headers to nginx configuration
steps: add Content-Security-Policy header
add Strict-Transport-Security (HSTS) header
add Referrer-Policy header
add Permissions-Policy header
configure HTTPS with SSL/TLS certificates
add HTTP to HTTPS redirect
create generic batch insert helper in server-agent/storage/turso.go
refactor 6+ InsertXMetrics functions to use generic helper
create useMetricQuery factory function in dashboard/src/hooks/
refactor 7 useXMetrics hooks to use factory
create generic fetchMetrics utility in dashboard/src/lib/turso.ts
refactor 8 fetch functions to use generic utility
create collector interface in server-agent for main loop
add integration tests for Go storage layer (InsertX functions)
add edge case tests for collectors with mocked gopsutil
add component tests for MetricCard, DashboardHeader, ServerSelector
add tests for ProcessList component
add integration tests for TanStack Query data flow
add tests for turso.ts fetch functions with mocked client
configure coverage reporting in CI
wrap Go errors with context using fmt.Errorf
add retry logic with exponential backoff for failed inserts
aggregate and report error metrics in daemon
add Retry button to MetricCard component
implement error logging/analytics in dashboard
improve user-facing error messages

tasks.description: Add health check endpoint to Go daemon
steps: add HTTP server to daemon (port 8080)
implement /health endpoint (liveness probe)
implement /ready endpoint (readiness probe)
return JSON with daemon status, last collection timestamp, error count
add health check to Docker container configuration
document health check usage in README
configure Tailwind dark mode with class strategy
create ThemeContext provider with toggle function
add theme toggle button in DashboardHeader
update all components with dark: variants
store theme preference in localStorage
respect system preference as default
add alerts table to schema (rule_id, metric_type, threshold, condition)
add alert_history table (server_id, rule_id, triggered_at, value)
implement alert evaluation logic in daemon after metric collection
create alert rules management page in dashboard
create alert history view with filtering
add visual indicator in header when alerts are active

tasks.description: Add server management page with setup wizard for new servers
steps: create /servers route for server management page
display list of all registered servers with status (online/offline/last seen)
add server details view showing hostname, OS, uptime, agent version
create 'Add New Server' wizard with step-by-step instructions
generate unique server API key/token for each new server
display installation commands (curl/wget one-liner for agent setup)
show environment variable configuration template
add server rename and delete functionality
implement server health status polling (based on last metric timestamp)
add server grouping/tagging for organization
create navigation link to servers page in dashboard header
